brief_html: The slot index is returned since individual operations may be returned in a different order than they are requested.
format:
(UINT32) Slot index
(UINT32) [16] Data for the server's SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON (0x53) response
remarks_html:
The slot index is returned since individual operations may be returned in a different order than they are requested.

This message can also be used to calculate the server's SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTCHANGE (0x55) response. Simply substitute the SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON (0x53) data with the SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTCHANGE (0x55) data.
